stemHtml: On a back-beam ILS approach with the back-beam inbound course set on a HSI, the needle is showing half scale deflection to the right. What does this indicate?

options.a: The heading is to the right of the desired track.
options.b: The heading is to the left of the desired track.
options.c: The aircraft is to the right of the desired track.
options.d: The aircraft is to the left of the desired track.
